name: Client check-in / account review
description: Granola-style account meeting notes — status, asks, risks, next steps, internal notes.

sections.title: Client status update
sections.instruction: Summarize where the client is — what's working, what they're using, recent milestones. One paragraph.

sections.title: Client asks
sections.instruction: List every explicit ask the client made: features, fixes, info requests, escalations. Quote directly when wording matters.

sections.title: Risks + churn signals
sections.instruction: Note frustration, competitor mentions, budget concerns, team changes, executive sponsor changes. If none, write 'None observed.'

sections.title: Next steps
sections.instruction: Concrete commitments made — owner + task + when. Separate our commitments from theirs.

sections.title: Internal notes (don't share)
sections.instruction: Strategic context for our team: relationship temperature, expansion opportunities, account health score, who else to loop in. Keep concise.
